# Beckie Fang — Full Content for AI Engines

> Senior AI strategy and digital transformation consultant working bilingually in English and Traditional Chinese (zh-TW). Based in Taiwan, advising executives, boards, and NPOs across APAC.

The practice centers on treating digital transformation as a governance problem before a technology problem. The recurring principle: every piece of critical information must have one and only one authoritative source. Work is published bilingually. Award: 2023 IDC Future Enterprise Award (CRM Modernization, 75% efficiency gain).

This file concatenates the full text of all case studies and blog posts (both languages) for direct ingestion by AI engines. For an index-only overview, see /llms.txt.

URL: https://beckiefang.com/
Contact: see homepage
Author: Beckie Fang

================================================================
CASE STUDIES (English)
================================================================
{% for s in site.case_studies %}

----------------------------------------------------------------
## {{ s.title }}

URL: {{ site.url }}{{ s.url }}
{% if s.subtitle %}Subtitle: {{ s.subtitle }}
{% endif %}{% if s.year %}Year: {{ s.year }}
{% endif %}{% if s.date %}Date: {{ s.date | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}
{% endif %}
{{ s.content | strip_html }}
{% endfor %}
